headings.text: Tune every glyph to your brand.
Static SVG or live web font

paragraphs.text: Adjust stroke weight, duotone fill opacity, and accent color across the entire library. Every change is reflected in real time across the preview grid below.
Active swatch tints the foreground path. Background layer uses the same hue at 22% opacity.
Every Phosphor Glyph Forge icon is composed of a tinted base shape and a precision foreground stroke. Variables propagate to both layers, keeping visual hierarchy intact at any scale.
Every glyph is hand-tuned across four base sizes, then scales linearly to display sizes up to 256px without rasterization artifacts.
Bind --pg-tint, --pg-fill, --pg-weight and --pg-radius to your design system tokens and re-skin the entire library in one rule.
Customized output ships as compressed inline SVG, an .icomoon-ready bundle, or a React component pack with TypeScript definitions.
A premium SVG icon library of 400+ hand-crafted duotone glyphs, customizable down to the stroke.

TOKENS

        Bind --pg-tint, --pg-fill, --pg-weight and --pg-radius to your design system tokens and re-skin the entire library in one rule.

EXPORT

        Customized output ships as compressed inline SVG, an .icomoon-ready bundle, or a React component pack with TypeScript definitions.

Fill Opacity 0% 62% 100% Corner Radius SHARP 2px ROUND Export Snippet /* phosphor-config */ --pg-weight : 2.5px ; --pg-tint : #f5a623 ; --pg-fill : rgba(245,166,35,.22) ; --pg-radius : 2px ; Download SVG Copy CSS DUOTONE ARCHITECTURE Two layers, one glyph. Every Phosphor Glyph Forge icon is composed of a tinted base shape and a precision foreground stroke. Variables propagate to both layers, keeping visual hierarchy intact at any scale. LAYER 01 FILL · BASE Tinted Mass LAYER 02 STROKE · ACCENT Crisp Outline COMPOSITE GLYPH A --pg-fill B --pg-weight C --pg-tint D composite A + B  =  Duotone BASE FILL FOREGROUND STROKE ACCENT MARKER VARIABLE BINDING FIDELITY Pixel-snapped at 16, 20, 24, 32 Every glyph is hand-tuned across four base sizes, then scales linearly to display sizes up to 256px without rasterization artifacts. TOKENS Four CSS variables. Total control. Bind --pg-tint , --pg-fill , --pg-weight and --pg-radius to your design system tokens and re-skin the entire library in one rule. EXPORT Static SVG or live web font Customized output ships as compressed inline SVG, an .icomoon-ready bundle, or a React component pack with TypeScript definitions.
